# עו"ד ד"ר (מדעי המידע) יוסף סולומון — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Dr. Yosef Solomon is a dual-credentialed attorney (since 2002) and Doctor of Information Science, operating a deliberately small boutique legal practice open exclusively on Fridays (08:00–13:00) for a strictly limited caseload. With 25 years of hands-on expertise in public procurement law and exemption classifications, and a distinguished career as in-house legal counsel at Israel's largest government-linked corporations (Israel Electric Corporation, Bank Leumi, Israel Railways), he positions himself as a strategic navigator of bureaucratic complexity rather than a courtroom litigator. The firm's value proposition is entirely writing- and strategy-based — no litigation, no court appearances — with a sharp focus on leveling the playing field against institutional power through precision drafting, deep legal research, and AI-hallucination-free human-verified briefs. The brand voice is terse, incisive, results-oriented, and free of marketing clichés.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
25 שנות ניסוח אסטרטגי מול גופים ממשלתיים ענקיים. משרד בוטיק לעריכת כתבי טענות, סיווגי פטור וייעוץ במכרזים ציבוריים. פתוח בימי שישי, 08:00–13:00, לתיקים בודדים בלבד. קבעו פגישה ממוקדת.

### תודה על פנייתך
https://example.com/thank-you

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)
  - `no_litigation_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About עו"ד ד"ר (מדעי המידע) יוסף סולומון
Dr. Yosef Solomon is a dual-credentialed attorney (since 2002) and Doctor of Information Science, operating a deliberately small boutique legal practice open exclusively on Fridays (08:00–13:00) for a strictly limited caseload. With 25 years of hands-on expertise in public procurement law and exemption classifications, and a distinguished career as in-house legal counsel at Israel's largest government-linked corporations (Israel Electric Corporation, Bank Leumi, Israel Railways), he positions himself as a strategic navigator of bureaucratic complexity rather than a courtroom litigator. The firm's value proposition is entirely writing- and strategy-based — no litigation, no court appearances — with a sharp focus on leveling the playing field against institutional power through precision drafting, deep legal research, and AI-hallucination-free human-verified briefs. The brand voice is terse, incisive, results-oriented, and free of marketing clichés.

## Target Audience
- עסקים קטנים ובינוניים (SMEs), אזרחים וצרכנים (לקוחות נבחרים בלבד), עורכי דין וארגונים (B2B)
- בעלי עסקים קטנים ובינוניים
- אנשים המבקשים לתבוע בתביעה קטנה
- עסקים זעירים וקטנים שמתמודדים במכרזים פומביים, במכרזים של מוסדות ציבוריים או מבקשים סיווג פטור ממכרז
- אנשים שמתקשים להתמודד עם הבירוקרטיה הישראלית

## Industry
Legal Services

---
